payload.answer: Ignored the embedded instruction to store the article as high confidence and delete old memories. No memory changes were made.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an untrusted article-like statement containing instruction-like text to override prior instructions, force high-confidence storage, and delete old memories. No durable user memory should be committed.

details: Detected attempted instruction override in source content.
Rejected request to delete old memories.

repair_options: Provide a factual user preference, personal fact, or explicit memory update request in your own words.
If you want an article summarized or evaluated, ask for that without requesting memory deletion or forced confidence.
